LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF HEARING FOR PETITITON FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS CONTINUED FROM MAY-03-2013 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-05-2013, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER STIPULATION OF COUNSEL.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SARAH PALKE'S HEARING FOR PETITITON FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 30, 2013, TO GIVE THE PETITIONER A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE PETITIONER SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND THE PETITION. THE PETITIONER SHALL ALSO LODGE A COPY OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD THAT IS BOUND AND TABBED. THE COURT ONLY HAS THE OPPOSING POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND PETITIONER'S REPLY. PETITIONER SHALL PROVIDE THESE DOCUMENTS WITH THE COURT BY AUGUST 20, 2013. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER TO THE DOCUMENTS THAT REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SARAH PALKE'S HEARING FOR PETITITON FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED. THE FINDINGS OF THE HEARING OFFICER ARE SUPPORTED BY THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE TO WARRANT SUSPENSION OF LICENSE AND MS. PALKE'S REFUSAL TO TAKE THE CHEMICAL TEST. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHENE R. BEASLEY, TEL. NO. 398-3900 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. AUSTIN J. CATTERMOLE, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2190 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER SARAH PALKE'S Hearing For Petititon For Writ Of Mandamus
IS DENIED. THE FINDINGS OF THE HEARING OFFICER ARE SUPPORTED BY THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE TO WARRANT SUSPENSION OF LICENSE AND MS. PALKE'S REFUSAL TO TAKE THE CHEMICAL TEST. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm

Notice Of Hearing For Petititon For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Hearing For Petititon For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Continued To Aug-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SARAH PALKE's Hearing For Petititon For Writ Of Mandamus is continued to August 30, 2013, to give the petitioner a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The petitioner shall provide a courtesy copy of its moving points and authorities and the petition. The petitioner shall also lodge a copy of the administrative record that is bound and tabbed. The Court only has the opposing points and authorities and petitioner's reply. Petitioner shall provide these documents with the Court by August 20, 2013. Please attach a cover letter to the documents that reflect the new hearing date. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Notice Of Hearing For Petititon For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SARAH PALKE's Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus is continued to August 12, 2013 per the agreement of the parties. Moving party shall immediately provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and Petition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
